value.found_quote:
Claude Cowork by Anthropic
Claude Cowork handles tasks autonomously. Give it a goal and Claude works on your computer, local files, and applications to return a finished deliverable.
value.rationale: The fetched page is the official Anthropic product page for "Claude Cowork," explicitly branding it as "Claude Cowork by Anthropic." The page describes it as a generally available offering ("Claude Cowork is currently available on all paid plans"), confirming it is an active product and fully substantiating the claim.
